item.text: {"approval_state":"proposed","bottleneck":"The current accepted claim is a single strided-point measurement without a matched cache-friendly control, so the locality hypothesis is not yet directly tested within the same benchmark family and launch configuration.","continue_recommended":true,"expected_gain":"A paired control run would convert the current point observation into a direct within-config comparison, improving interpretability of memory-hierarchy effects while staying inside the existing workflow and budget.","proposal":"Run one rollbackable follow-up spec in the same CUDA memory probe handler using identical launch parameters and deterministic controls but a cache-friendly access pattern, then analyze the result as a paired comparison against spec_3626106571cf. Keep all records append-only, link the new spec to the existing claim as a control/baseline comparison target, and preserve the same workflow stages from question selection through plan_next_step.","proposed_profile_updates":[{"context_sections":["question","spec","claim","verification"],"instruction_note":"When a hypothesis asserts relative performance (for example, 'lower than a cache-friendly regime'), require the next generated spec to include either an explicit matched control_run_target reference or a written reason why no control is needed.","reason":"This would reduce unsupported comparative claims and make later human review of benchmark intent and causal interpretation easier.","role":"spec_generator","sandbox_mode":"read-only","web_search_enabled":false},{"context_sections":["spec","claim","verification"],"instruction_note":"Accept comparative claims for curation only if the analyzed run references a matched baseline/control spec under the same fixed launch configuration, or else downgrade the claim to a single-condition observation.","reason":"This preserves rigor without changing the append-only history model.","role":"analyzer","sandbox_mode":"read-only","web_search_enabled":false}],"risk":"If the chosen control pattern is not truly cache-friendly or not perfectly matched, the comparison may still be ambiguous; an extra run also consumes part of the round budget.","rollback_condition":"If the paired control run cannot be executed deterministically within the 120-second round budget or produces incompatible metadata, keep the current single-condition claim as the latest accepted result and do not promote any comparative conclusion.","stop_reason":null,"target_workflow_version":"workflow_v1"}
